detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use clk_wiz driver.

sect1.title: xclk_wiz_intr_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XClk_wiz driver directly. This example uses the XClk_Wiz driver with interrupts. It will generate interrupt for clok glitch, clock overflow and underflow. The user should have setup with 2 clocking wizard instances, one instance act as clocking monitor (Enable clock monitor in GUI), In another instance enable dynamic clock reconfiguration.
